description: Fragment of a letter from Abū ʿAli b. al-Dimyāṭī to his brother Abu Saʿīd b. Hibat Allah (Ḥalfon b. Netanel). The writer mentions the silk trade, describes his joy when he learned that Ḥalfon recovered after taking a medicine, and invites him to visit him in Fustat. Transcription from Goitein’s handwritten notes.
tags: illness: recovered, Halfon b. Netanel, halfon-addenda, Illness, illness letter 969-1517, IB4, ib-addenda, Illness: treatment
description_he: מכתב מאבו עלי ב. אל-דמיאטי לאחיו בנוגע לסחר במשי
